name: AAA Lead Pro PA
description: Certified mold testing and inspection services along with lead, asbestos, and water damage restoration in Philadelphia and surrounding areas. 24/6 availability.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.summary: Certified mold testing and inspection services along with lead, asbestos, and water damage restoration in Philadelphia and surrounding areas. 24/6 availability.

name: Mold Test Company
description: Board-certified mold inspectors providing environmental testing, inspection, and identification services across Pennsylvania including Philadelphia, Pittsburgh, and Erie.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: They were the most thorough company of the 5 that we contacted.
He told us he would treat the home as if it was his own. And he did!
Great service and informative. Went above and beyond.
The technician showed tremendous respect upon realizing I was a Vietnam era vet.

sentiment.summary: Mold Test Company has an excellent reputation with consistently positive reviews praising their thoroughness, professionalism, respectful service, and commitment to solving customers' mold and air quality issues.
